rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DECLARATION OF TRUST FOR SHEILA CORRY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Special And General Demurrer To Eamon Corry' Petition For Removal Of Trustee; Accounting; Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Breach Of Trust And Fiduciary Duty; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Hon. Judge Joseph M. Quinn. Respondent Bernard Corry's Special and General Demurrer to Eamon Corry's Petition for Removal of Trustee; Accounting; Appointment of Successor Trustee; Breach of Trust and Fiduciary Duty is ordered OFF CALENDAR. The Special and General Demurrer is currently brought against a Petition that cannot go forward; the Petitioner is deceased and Petitioner's personal representative has not - and apparently will not - substitute into the Petition. Concurrent with this tentative ruling, the Court will issue an Order to Show Cause why Eamon Corry's Petition for Removal of Trustee; Accounting; Appointment of Successor Trustee; Breach of Trust and Fiduciary Duty should not be ordered off calendar given the circumstances. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the court day before the hearing. Remote appearance is strongly encouraged, in conformity with the current General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division, available on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/probate. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
